description: Karaite betrothal deed. Gedalya b. ʿOvadya b. Gedalya is betrothing Esther known as Raḥel d. Naḥum b. Yeshūʿa. Dated Friday 14th Adar I, 5463 AM (1703 CE). Location: Cairo. The marital payments are listed as: 50 kesif + 860 medin + 200 medin + 800 medin.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
